overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Small Cap Moderate Buffer ETF - November (SNOV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the iShares Russell 2000 ETF over a one-year period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. SNOV was launched on Nov 17, 2023 and is issued by First Trust.
